statDesc.locomotion: Your ability to move around effectively.
statDesc.scouting: Your ability to discover new things.
statDesc.digestion: Your ability to digest and grow.
statDesc.focus: Your ability to multitask and learn multiple things at once.
statDesc.defense: Your ability to withstand assault and stay intact.
statDesc.attack: Your ability to fight and ward off larger lifeforms.
statDesc.delayAttack: Your ability to know your opponent and be where they are not.
statDesc.combat: Mastery over your opponents, allowing you to better understand them.
statDesc.mindControl: The ability to assume control over another's will.
statDesc.shapeShifting: The ability to control the shape, looks and function of your own body.

skillsDesc.test1: This skill affects a test stat
skillsDesc.test2: Test skill affects the effect of the previous skill
skillsDesc.test3: Test skill levels up very fast
skillsDesc.focus: Collect your thoughts and learn how to get more things done at once.
skillsDesc.movement:
You do not know what you are or where you are.
Learn to move around randomly and you may just discover something.
skillsDesc.scouting:
You''ve found something while exploring.'
Try to figure out what it is.
skillsDesc.deepScouting:
Tiny holes litter the surface, leading to new unexplored territory.
Perhaps there are more nutrients there.
skillsDesc.memorization: Organize what you've learned so far and figure out how to learn more efficiently.
skillsDesc.scavenger:
You're becoming quite good at finding nutrients.
You should be able to learn how to multitask and scavenge and consume at the same time.
skillsDesc.digestion:
Some of things you've discovered can be dissolved and combined into your being.
Learn to digest and grow.
skillsDesc.efficientDigestion: There's much loss when converting nutrients into mass. You should work on making this process more efficient.
skillsDesc.multitasking: Become more proficient at managing multiple tasks at once, lowering the penalty of focusing on multiple skills.
skillsDesc.rival1Study:
You've located a peculiar lifeform, much larger and sophisticated than what's around you.
You should try to figure out what it is.
skillsDesc.rival1Study_alt:
An aggressive lifeform resides nearby.
Study it to learn how to better protect yourself.
skillsDesc.rival2Study:
You've located another large lifeform, different from the previous one though still somewhat similar
You should figure out how it behaves and protect yourself in case it starts attacking.
skillsDesc.bodyHardening:
An unfamiliar sensation has washed over you. That lifeform you discovered approached and stole part of your body.
You should retreat and defend yourself to limit future damage.
skillsDesc.attack:
Your new rival clearly does not intend to keep you alive.
You need to evolve and find a way to fight back.
skillsDesc.aggression:
Devote more effort into fighting off your rival.
Lowers the preparation time needed between attacks.
skillsDesc.evasion:
You're starting to slowly learn how your new rivals behave.
You can adapt your movement to avoid pulling their interest towards you, delaying the rate at which you get attacked.
skillsDesc.rivalBehavior:
Your rivals may be dangerous, but don't seem to adapt well.
Their stagnant nature allows you to learn how to better handle them.
skillsDesc.abilities:
Devote considerable effort into developing special properties.
These special abilities will be of great use against your rivals.
skillsDesc.confusion:
Produce a substance that instills confusion in your rivals.
Your rivals will become more likely to attack each other and leave you alone.
skillsDesc.mimicry:
Transform the outer layer of your body to closely resemble that of your rivals.
This makes them think you are one of them and ingore you.

res.nutrients_desc: Discovered nutrients, can be digested to gain mass
res.size_desc: A larger mass allows better ability to perform and learn.
res.focus_desc: The amount of skills you can progress in at a time.
res.focus_desc_1: The speed of skills is divided by the amount of focus invested.

rivals.rival1_desc: A large lifeform resides nearby. It can be studied.
rivals.rival1_desc_alt: An aggressive lifeform resides nearby. Beware, it may attack and steal part of your mass.
rivals.rival_desc_attack: It recently attacked and stole %0 of your mass!
rivals.rival_desc_attack_1: It recently attacked and stole %0 mass of your other rival!
rivals.rival2_desc: Another dangerous lifeform resides nearby. It seems slow but powerful.
rivals.self_combat_desc: You are preparing an attack against your rival.
rivals.self_combat_desc_2: You recently attacked %1 and stole %0 Mass!
